sections.title: Coverage Saat Ini: **0%** — zero test files, zero test runner.
1. Fungsi/Class Tanpa Test (13 file)
sections.content:
| Layer | File | Gap |
|---|---|---|
| Auth lib | `src/lib/auth.ts` | `encryptSession`, `decryptSession`, `hashPassword`, `verifyPassword`, `getSession`, `isAdmin`, `isSiswa` — semua utility kritis, 0 test |
| Pure logic | `src/utils/waNotification.ts` | `buildMessage()` (4 branching paths), `extractCountryCode()` (logika 1-digit vs 2-digit) |
| External API | `src/utils/waNotification.ts` | `sendWhatsAppNotification()` — network failure, non-200, missing token, timeout |
| PDF export | `src/utils/pdfExport.ts` | `exportAttendanceToPDF()` — 0 baris di-test |
| Route handler | 11 file API route | Setiap `GET`/`POST`/`PUT`/`DELETE` — 0 coverage |
| Inline helper | `teacher/attendance/route.ts:145` | `sendWANotif()` — private function, silent failure (log-only, no throw) |

sections.title: 2. Edge Case Gaps (16 skenario)
sections.content:
| Kategori | Edge Case | Risiko |
|---|---|---|
| **Auth** | IV static di AES — ciphertext deterministic | MEDIUM — token identical for same session data |
| **Auth** | Non-ASCII password (emoji, unicode) | LOW — bcrypt handle, tapi tidak ada test |
| **Login** | `x-forwarded-proto` inconsistent → cookie `secure: false` di HTTPS | HIGH — session token bisa dikirim via HTTP |
| **Login** | Rate limit Map memory leak (unlimited IP entries) | MEDIUM — DoS via unique IP per request |
| **Approval** | Double approval → update tanpa transaksi | HIGH — izin status berubah tapi kehadiran gagal |
| **Approval** | `(targetIzin.tipe as any)` — bypass TypeScript | MEDIUM — null/undefined tipe force 'IZIN' |
| **Attendance** | NIS non-numeric → `parseInt('2024A') = 0` | LOW — sort rusuh |
| **Attendance** | Status unknown di data array → silent skip | MEDIUM — tidak ada feedback ke user |
| **Attendance** | Siswa tidak ditemukan → `continue` tanpa feedback | LOW |
| **Stats** | Timezone `setHours(0,0,0,0)` — server UTC beda dengan lokal | MEDIUM — data bisa salah tanggal |
| **Recap** | `MONTH_MAP[undefined]` → fallback silent ke bulan sekarang | MEDIUM — query salah bulan |
| **Recap** | Tanggal di masa depan tidak divalidasi | LOW |
| **Student Permit** | File size tepat 2MB: `>`, bukan `>=` | LOW — 2.0MB lolos |
| **Student Permit** | `Date.now()` di filename — collision request simultan | LOW |
| **Student Permit** | File type cek mime, bukan magic bytes | MEDIUM — bisa bypass ekstensi |
| **Password** | Duplicate implementation (`auth/password` vs `admin/password`) | MEDIUM — fix di satu, lupa fix di satunya |

sections.title: 3. Missing Error Handling (10 skenario)
sections.content:
| Skenario | Route | Dampak |
|---|---|---|
| `request.json()` gagal (invalid body) | Semua POST/PUT | 500 generic, tanpa info |
| Prisma connection down | Semua route | 500 generic, log error |
| `writeFile` gagal (disk full) | `student/permit` | 500 tanpa cleanup file |
| `crypto.createDecipheriv` key salah | `decryptSession` | Return null, tidak log |
| WA gateway non-200 | `sendWhatsAppNotification` | Return `{success:false}`, tanpa retry |
| WA gateway return non-JSON | `sendWhatsAppNotification` | `res.json()` throw → catch handle |
| Rate limit Map memory leak | Login | Tidak pernah cleanup IP lama |
| Rejected izin → kehadiran upsert gagal | Approval POST | **Inkonsistensi data — perlu transaction** |
| Login 3 query sequential, 1 gagal | Login | Hanya catch generic, tidak bedain error type |

sections.title: 4. Integration Test Gaps (8 skenario)
sections.content:
| Skenario | Komponen |
|---|---|
| Login GURU → POST attendance → GET recap → verify data | Full flow |
| Siswa submit izin → Guru approve → Kehadiran ter-update | Permit lifecycle |
| Admin create class + guru → Guru login | Provisioning |
| File upload → lihat di approval page | Upload + display |
| Set ALPA → WA notification terkirim | Notification chain |
| Role isolation: SISWA akses endpoint GURU, GURU akses endpoint ADMIN | Auth boundary |
| 6x login gagal → 429 | Rate limit integration |
| Export PDF dengan data real → verify content | PDF pipeline |

---

sections.title: Files Written
sections.content:
| File | Isi |
|---|---|
| `src/lib/__tests__/auth.test.ts` | encrypt/decrypt/hash/verify/getSession — 15 test cases |
| `src/utils/__tests__/waNotification.test.ts` | extractCountryCode (5), buildMessage (6 todo), sendWhatsAppNotification (6 todo) |
| `src/utils/__tests__/pdfExport.test.ts` | 8 test cases — empty, large, 0%/100%, unicode, edge metadata |
| `src/app/api/auth/login/__tests__/route.test.ts` | Rate limit, validation, admin/guru login — 8 test |
| `src/app/api/admin/approval/__tests__/route.test.ts` | Double approval, reject→ALPA, not found — 9 test |
| `src/app/api/admin/attendance/__tests__/route.test.ts` | WA notification, skip unknown, empty array — 9 test |
| `src/app/api/admin/classes/__tests__/route.test.ts` | CRUD, duplicate, guru creation — 6 test |
| `src/app/api/admin/stats/__tests__/route.test.ts` | Zero attendance, top absentees, distribution — 4 test |
| `src/app/api/admin/student/__tests__/route.test.ts` | Duplicate NIS/username, cookie auth — 4 test |
| `src/app/api/teacher/attendance/__tests__/route.test.ts` | Role check, skip other class — 7 test |
| `src/app/api/student/permit/__tests__/route.test.ts` | File validation (type/size), stats — 6 test |
| `src/app/api/recap/__tests__/route.test.ts` | EN/ID month parsing, empty data — 6 test |
| `src/app/api/auth/password/__tests__/route.test.ts` | Role-specific update, passwordPlain sync — 7 test |
| `test-setup.ts` | Global env vars + mocks |
| _(perlu dibuat)_ `vitest.config.ts` | Config dengan path alias, coverage threshold 80% |
| _(perlu ditambah)_ `package.json` scripts | `"test": "vitest run"`, `"test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage"` |

Total: **~87 test cases** (+ beberapa `todo` untuk skenario yang perlu refactor `buildMessage` jadi export public).

---

sections.title: Urutan Implementasi
sections.content:
1. `npm install -D vitest @vitest/coverage-v8`
2. Buat `vitest.config.ts`
3. Ekstrak `buildMessage()` jadi export function di `waNotification.ts`
4. Jalankan `npm test` → perbaiki mock yang kurang
5. Target: coverage ≥ 80% di semua route handler dan utils
